records.snippet: Two-page sample bank statement PDF, suitable for merge, split, extract-pages, rotate, metadata dump, and repair-style pass-through tests.
Official multi-page IRS PDF form that works well for page extraction, rotation, encryption/decryption, and metadata inspection workflows.
Public fillable PDF form with editable fields; suitable for form-field discovery and fill_form workflows when paired with external FDF/XFDF data.
Single-page invoice PDF template, suitable for overlay/stamp, background watermark, form-like document handling, and attachment-safe PDF transformations.
Structured commercial invoice PDF with many fields and table regions, useful for page manipulation, form handling, and metadata extraction.
